title: Phase 32.4 — Recovery Scorecard

indexed_pages.trend: FLAT — no meaningful change in 18 days

impressions_7d.trend: STAGNATING — +34% jump Jun 2-8 to Jun 9-15, then -0.9% decline Jun 9-15 to Jun 10-17

average_position_7d.trend: IMPROVING — average position improved from 35.9 to 15.1. This is likely due to fewer deep-position pages in the latest window, not better individual page rankings.

detail: Impressions rose 34% then flattened. Indexed pages unchanged. Discovered-not-indexed unchanged. Clicks remain at zero. Average position improvement is misleading — driven by window composition, not ranking gains. Site is not recovering — it is stable but clickless.
recovery_signal: NONE — no metric shows meaningful positive momentum
